summary: Completed comprehensive frontend testing of 3 new features: 1) Multi-language support (8 languages), 2) Financial news integration, 3) K-line chart technical indicators (MACD/RSI/Bollinger). All features working correctly. Language switching verified for Chinese/English/Japanese/Korean. AI prediction and Divination features also verified.

issues: Console warning about chart width(-1) and height(-1) - cosmetic issue, does not affect functionality

passed_tests: Multi-language: Language switcher dropdown displays all 8 languages (zh, en, ja, ko, th, ms, hi, ar)
Multi-language: Switch from Chinese to English - UI text changes to 'Market Overview', 'Top Gainers', 'Financial News'
Multi-language: Switch to Japanese - UI text changes to 'アジア金融', '市場概要', '金融ニュース'
Multi-language: Switch to Korean - UI text changes to '아시아 금융', '시장 개요', '금융 뉴스'
Multi-language: RTL direction support for Arabic configured in translations.js
Financial News: 财经新闻 section displays on homepage right side
Financial News: 8 news items loaded from API with region flags (Asia, China, Japan, HK, Korea)
Financial News: Refresh button functional - news updates on click
Financial News: News items show title, region, timestamp
Technical Indicators: MACD toggle button found and functional (data-testid='toggle-macd')
Technical Indicators: RSI toggle button found and functional (data-testid='toggle-rsi')
Technical Indicators: Bollinger Bands toggle button found and functional (data-testid='toggle-bollinger')
Technical Indicators: MACD chart displays DIF/DEA lines and histogram
Technical Indicators: RSI chart displays with 70/30 reference lines
Technical Indicators: Bollinger Bands overlay on main price chart with upper/mid/lower bands
Technical Indicators: Toggle states persist correctly (on/off)
AI Prediction: Start prediction button functional (data-testid='ai-predict-btn')
AI Prediction: Loading state shows '量子计算中...' animation
AI Prediction: Result displays direction badge (看涨/看跌/中性)
AI Prediction: Result displays confidence level with progress bar
AI Prediction: Result displays target price range
AI Prediction: Result displays support/resistance levels
AI Prediction: Result displays analysis details and suggestions
AI Prediction: Result displays risk warning
Divination: Name input functional (data-testid='divination-name-input')
Divination: Time period selector functional
Divination: Start divination button functional (data-testid='divination-btn')
Divination: Loading state shows '神谕降临中...' animation
Divination: Report displays with full content (3902 chars verified)
Watchlist: Add to watchlist button functional (data-testid='add-watchlist-btn')
Watchlist: Toast notification shows '已添加 贵州茅台 到自选股'
Watchlist: Watchlist page loads with proper UI (我的自选股 title)
Homepage: Market overview with stocks from A股/美股/港股/日股

features_verified.multi_language_8_languages: VERIFIED - zh/en/ja/ko/th/ms/hi/ar all present in dropdown
features_verified.language_switching_ui_update: VERIFIED - Navigation, titles, button labels all update on language change
features_verified.financial_news_homepage: VERIFIED - Displays on homepage right side with regional news
features_verified.financial_news_refresh: VERIFIED - Refresh button updates news content
features_verified.technical_indicators_macd: VERIFIED - Toggle on/off with DIF/DEA/Histogram chart
features_verified.technical_indicators_rsi: VERIFIED - Toggle on/off with 70/30 reference lines
features_verified.technical_indicators_bollinger: VERIFIED - Toggle on/off with bands overlaid on price chart
features_verified.ai_prediction_display: VERIFIED - Results not blank, shows full analysis with direction/confidence/targets
features_verified.divination_display: VERIFIED - Results show full 金融天机推演报告
features_verified.watchlist_add: VERIFIED - Add button works with toast confirmation

critical_code_review_comments: Chart console warnings about width/height (-1) are cosmetic and do not affect functionality
Watchlist uses client_id from localStorage which is generated fresh each browser session
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 3 new features verified: 1) Multi-language (8 languages) - LanguageSwitcher in header works correctly with translations in translations.js, 2) Financial News - displays on homepage right side with refresh, 3) Technical Indicators - MACD/RSI/Bollinger toggle buttons in StockDetailPage work correctly. AI Prediction and Divination also verified working. Console chart warnings are cosmetic only.

homepage_news_section.png - Financial News with regional news items
